commands_run: cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py
failure_reason: Moved the ideas-router Form expression one step closer to the north star by adding a native kernel-router structure route at /api/ideas/router-structure. The first kernel-router smoke exposed a pre-existing production manifest blocker: routes referenced health_route_from_class from a source-language section, which served as a known red in Rust tests and prevented manifest boot. Replaced the live /health route-table row with a plain Form handler so the manifest boots, then proved the new ideas route returns HTTP 200, application/json, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, and source-backed JSON. form/validate.sh still text-diverges on closure-table output because sibling kernels render closure identities differently; the carrier smoke is the route-level proof.

commands: cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_runtime_surface_native_routes.py
